    refine ⟨⟨k - 2, by zify [hk]; linarith⟩, ⟨k - 1, by zify [hk]; linarith⟩, ⟨k, by zify [hk]; linarith⟩⟩
  have distinct : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ a ≠ c := by zify [hk]; omega
  have h1 := h.1; have h2 := h.2
  by_cases as : a ∈ S <;> by_cases bs : b ∈ S <;> by_cases cs : c ∈ S
  · exact h1 a as b bs distinct.1 squares.1
  · exact h1 a as c cs distinct.2.2 squares.2.2
  · exact h1 a as b bs distinct.1 squares.1
  · exact h2 b (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_range (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_singleton _)), bs⟩) c (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_range (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_singleton _))), cs⟩) distinct.2.1 squares.2.1
  · exact h1 b bs c cs distinct.2.1 squares.2.1
  · exact h2 a (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_range (Set.mem_singleton _), as⟩) c (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_range (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_singleton _))), cs⟩) distinct.2.2 squares.2.2
  · exact h1 b bs c cs distinct.2.1 squares.2.1
  · exact h2 a (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_range (Set.mem_singleton _), as⟩) b (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_range (Set.mem_insert_of_mem _ (Set.mem_singleton _)), bs⟩) distinct.1 squares.1

by_contra! h
  obtain ⟨hS1, hS2⟩ := h
  let k := Nat.sqrt (n + 1) - 1
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := by
    have h1 : 101 ≤ n + 1 := by omega
    have h2 : 10 ≤ Nat.sqrt (n + 1) := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr h1
    omega
  let a := 2 * k * k - 4 * k
  let b := 2 * k * k + 1
  let c := 2 * k * k + 4 * k
  have ha : n ≤ a := by
    have h1 : n + 1 < (k + 2) * (k + 2) := Nat.lt_sqrt_add_one (n + 1)
    omega
  have hc : c ≤ 2 * n := by
    have h1 : (k + 1) * (k + 1) ≤ n + 1 := Nat.sqrt_le (n + 1)
    omega
  have has : IsSquare (a + b) := ⟨2 * k - 1, by zify [hk]; ring⟩
  have hcs : IsSquare (a + c) := ⟨2 * k, by zify [hk]; ring⟩
  have hbs : IsSquare (b + c) := ⟨2 * k + 1, by zify [hk]; ring⟩
  have ha_mem : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨ha, by omega⟩
  have hb_mem : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨by omega, by omega⟩
  have hc_mem : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨by omega, hc⟩
  by_cases haS : a ∈ S
  · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
    · left; use a, haS, b, hbS; exact ⟨by omega, has⟩
    · by_cases hcS : c ∈ S
      · left; use a, haS, c, hcS; exact ⟨by omega, hcs⟩
      · right; use b, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_mem, hbS⟩, c, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_mem, hcS⟩; exact ⟨by omega, hbs⟩
  · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
    · by_cases hcS : c ∈ S
      · left; use b, hbS, c, hcS; exact ⟨by omega, hbs⟩
      · right; use a, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_mem, haS⟩, c, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_mem, hcS⟩; exact ⟨by omega, hcs⟩
    · right; use a, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_mem, haS⟩, b, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_mem, hbS⟩; exact ⟨by omega, has⟩
